firebasejs
==========

firebase v12.15.0 libraries downloaded from https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/12.15.0/. See: https://firebase.google.com/docs/web/setup

Official Documentation: https://firebase.google.com/docs/web/setup

**Local**                   | **Upstream CDN URL**
----------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------
`firebase-app.js`           | https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/12.15.0/firebase-app.js
`firebase-app.js.map`       | https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/12.15.0/firebase-app.js.map
`firebase-firestore.js`     | https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/12.15.0/firebase-firestore.js
`firebase-firestore.js.map` | https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/12.15.0/firebase-firestore.js.map

_**Note:** `firebase-firestore.js` was updated to reference the local version of `firebase-app.js` instead of the Google CDN._
